originalTitle: SUMMER GAME FEST 2026: Official 4K60FPS Livestream, (Resident Evil Veronica, FINAL FANTASY VII)
content: Join Geoff Keighley and Lucy James live from Dolby Theatre in Hollywood for a 2 hour live look at what's next in video games, with new game announcements, surprise special guests and more. Immediately followed by Day of the Devs. Streaming live in 4K 60FPS at 5p ET / 2p PT / 11p CEST. Subscribe to Watch more Summer Game fest: http://bit.ly/tga18sub Follow SGF on X: http://www.x.com/summergamefest Follow Summer Game Fest on Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/summergamefest Follow Geoff Keighley on X: http://www.x.com/geoffkeighley #summergamefest #sgf #worldpremiere
chineseContent: 加入杰夫·基斯利 (Geoff Keighley) 和露西·詹姆斯 (Lucy James) 在好莱坞杜比剧院 (Dolby Theater) 进行的 2 小时现场直播，了解电子游戏的未来发展，包括新游戏公告、惊喜特邀嘉宾等。紧接着是开发者日。以 4K 60FPS 在 5p ET / 2p PT / 11p CEST 进行直播。订阅观看更多夏季游戏节：http://bit.ly/tga18sub 在 X 上关注 SGF：http://www.x.com/summergamefest 在 Instagram 上关注夏季游戏节：http://www.instagram.com/summergamefest 在 X 上关注 Geoff Keighley：http://www.x.com/geoffkeighley #summergamefest #sgf #worldpremiere
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
